arts.ttl: ‘Wow’: Danny Murphy says player Tottenham sold for £1m was almost as good as Steven Gerrard in training
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have had some incredible young talents over the years. Dele Alli was a two-time PFA Young Player of the Year winner, Gareth Bale...

arts.ttl: John Wenham thrilled as Tottenham seal transfer ahead of Man City
arts.sum: It’s not often that Tottenham can say they’ve outfoxed Man City, but that certainly appears to be the case with their capture of Luka Vuskovic. At just 17 years of age, the North Londoners are believed to have paid £12m for his services (Tottenham News), and that follows what’s now become standard practice for the […] The post John Wenham thrilled as Tottenham seal transfer ahead of Man City appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Spanish giants eye SHOCK move for Archie Gray
arts.sum: Muchodeporte reports that the club's sporting director, Victor Orta, is pushing for the teenager's transfer even though he joined Spurs in the summer. Sevilla are looking at a possible move for Archie Gray, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Agent of Tottenham Defender Downplays Transfer Buzz
arts.sum: Radu Dragusin has been linked to a Serie A return, at Napoli in particular, since he’s not getting consistent minutes at Tottenham. On the other hand, his agent Florin Manea soft-pedaled the chatter in an interview: "I didn't speak with anybody." The post Agent of Tottenham Defender Downplays Transfer Buzz appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
